name: Hearty Beef Vegetable Soup with Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, combine 8 cups of water, 14 oz can of Italian tomato sauce, chopped onions, and mixed frozen vegetables.
2. Add the seasoning mix (olive oil, oregano, Mexican chili powder, freshly ground pepper, red cayenne pepper, salt) to the pot.
3. Heat the mixture on high for 30 minutes.
4. Brown the beef in a frying pan using extra virgin olive oil.
5. Transfer the browned beef to the soup using a slotted spoon to leave the fat in the frying pan.
6. Reduce heat to medium and continue cooking for an additional 10 minutes.
7. Add the egg noodles to the pot and reduce heat to low.
8. Continue cooking for another 20 minutes, tasting and adjusting seasoning as needed.
9. Serve with grated Parmesan cheese.
